name: integration_my_first_real_week_of_sales_on_my_websit
method: My first real week of sales on my website

phases.name: scrape
steps: reddit_scrape r/Entrepreneur r/SideProject r/startups keywords=['first week sales','first real sale','website sales week 1']

phases.name: extract
steps: claude -p analyze posts: extract traffic_source, product_type, price_point, conversion_tactic, CRO_move per post

phases.name: apply
steps: update product landing pages with top 3 new CRO tactics via content_factory
generate 3 'first week of sales' format posts for our products via engagement_bait_converter.py
